meaning: n.评价,估价(尤指估价财产,以便征税),鉴定
examples: She was honest in her appraisal of her team's chances.
It may also be necessary to get a new appraisal of the property.
What is needed in such cases is a calm appraisal of the situation.
Lacking an official appraisal, you can try a kindred measure--the market capitalization of the REIT.
As a result of this review, Matthew's appraisal was postponed until Thursday, 8 October.
